title: Fiverka's weapons
description: A BetterCombat based mod adding unique, late game weapons.
body:
A BetterCombat based mod adding unique, late game weapons.


Weapons currently added:

**The Aesthetic:** A vaporwave inspired shortsword, inflicting an unique, damaging debuff.

**Heaven Upside Down:** A heavy, two handed broadsword, inflcting slow and bleed.

**The Banner of Dreams:** A two handed spear, inflicting darkness on the last hit of its combo.

**Clamor Doloris**: A bayonet, its combo consisting of two melee attacks and a ranged shot.

**The Cerulean Shade:** A katana, its right-click ability enabling you to become temporarily invisible and faster at the cost of your health.

**Aero Mace:** An upgrade to the vanilla mace, obtainable through a unique smithing template.

**The Fool** - A bow, swaps you and the target hit, making both of you glow.

**Dawn's Forger & Twilight's Bearer** - Two daggers, the first one marks your target, allowing the second one to deal more damage.

**In Bloom** - An axe, fertilizing the ground on kill.

**Malice of the Thunder God** - A scythe, attacking enemies produces chain lightning. Right click to dash at the the cost of temporary armor reduction.

All weapons have custom combo movesets and colored attack trails. The recipes for the items can be found in your recipe book once you have some of the resources needed.

If you have any suggestions, bug reports or feedback, feel free to create an issue on github:
https://github.com/Fiverka21/fiverkas-weapons
